ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_loads" (
  "load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy load record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the energy load */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (1-24) */,
  "load_mw" REAL /* Energy load in megawatts (MW) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the energy load is recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the energy load */,
  "load_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of energy load */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_loads_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_loads_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES dates ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_loads_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_loads_load_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("load_type_id") REFERENCES energy_load_types ("load_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_loads_hour FOREIGN KEY ("hour") REFERENCES hours ("hour"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_loads_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which energy loads are recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hours" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hour */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (1-24) */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of the day (morning, afternoon, evening, night) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_load_types" (
  "load_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy load type */,
  "load_type" TEXT /* Type of energy load (e.g., MW, kWh) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the load type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of energy (e.g., solar, wind, fossil fuels) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of energy source (e.g., renewable, non-renewable) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, forecaster, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the energy load data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the energy load data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (1-24) */,
  "forecast_mw" REAL /* Forecasted energy load in megawatts (MW) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the forecast is made */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the forecast */,
  "load_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of energy load */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_load_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("load_type_id") REFERENCES energy_load_types ("load_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES dates ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_hour FOREIGN KEY ("hour") REFERENCES hours ("hour")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (1-24) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., high load, low load) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the notification is triggered */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the notification */,
  "load_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of energy load */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the notification */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_load_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("load_type_id") REFERENCES energy_load_types ("load_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES dates ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_hour FOREIGN KEY ("hour") REFERENCES hours ("hour")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (1-24) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Weather description (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)
